spotlight.title: Post Batch 1 — 9 days postable, the one lever with zero dependency
spotlight.detail: 6–7 reels ready since Jul 12; both LinkedIn pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI) have been fully filled out since Jul 19, so there's no page-content excuse left either. This needs no IRS reply, no Fable, no compliance clearance — just two founders picking reels and hitting post. Every PhantomBuster connect and follow-up sequence stays dark until it does.

spotlight.title: Get a real status on Monday's two taps — email won't tell us
spotlight.detail: Frankie's whole Monday PT business day has closed with zero email trace either way (live-verified again this morning: 0 threads in 48h, 0 EIN/IRS/Mercedes hits in 7 days). Did the IRS call connect? Were P6/P7 locked before Fable lapsed? A text settles both in one line — and decides whether Batch 3 starts today and whether the EIN chase escalates or closes out.

spotlight.title: Full Disk Access toggle — 25 days frozen, still a 2-minute fix
spotlight.detail: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. Same fix named in every brief since Jun 28 (re-confirmed this run: launchd.err.log still shows "Operation not permitted"). Flip it and tomorrow's 09:00 IST run executes autoloop cycle 11 unattended under guardrails.md.

blockers.label: EIN — 23 days silent, next window tonight IST
blockers.detail: Re-faxed Jun 28. Monday's 8 AM PT line opened and closed with no confirmed outcome either way. Next window: tonight ~8:30 PM IST (8 AM PT Tue). Backup: check RedFax 510-497-1224, or file SS-4 by fax for a guaranteed 4-business-day turnaround.

blockers.label: Fable EXPIRED — P6/P7 lock status still unconfirmed
blockers.detail: Lapsed Jul 19; two days on, nobody has confirmed whether the founder-ad and insurance scripts were finished in time. Unblock: one-line status check — locked means Batch 3 starts today, not-locked means redraft both through Claude Opus on the shared hanfluxai@gmail.com account.

blockers.label: Mercedes reply — 11 days overdue
blockers.detail: Their reply has sat unanswered since Jul 10. Build the reply on timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's multi-day response delay, pitch voice AI + automation, then book a live call where the agent demos itself.

tasks.detail: 6–7 reels ready since Jul 12; both pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI) fully filled out since Jul 19 — no page-content excuse left. Mutually pick, post to personal + company pages. Nothing else in the growth funnel moves until this does.

tasks.lead: Send a one-line status on the IRS call
tasks.detail: Monday's 8 AM PT window opened and closed with zero email trace. Did the call connect, or is it still queued for tonight's window? A text settles it faster than waiting on the inbox.

tasks.lead: Confirm P6/P7 were locked before Fable lapsed

Their reply has sat since Jul 10. Weapon: timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's multi-day response delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book a live call where the agent demos itself.

tasks.detail: Father's direct access to CM Hemant Soren is the moat — an investor buys both the deal and the optics. Your brochure artifact is done; Chitraksh is building the landing page around it.

tasks.lead: Full Disk Access toggle — 2 minutes, 25 days frozen
tasks.detail: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. Flip it and tomorrow's 09:00 IST run executes autoloop cycle 11 unattended — guardrails.md governs the run as always.

tasks.detail: Attach the video-gen MCP and ingest Prompt P10's feedback now, so generation begins the instant the P6/P7 script question resolves — locked-via-Fable or redrafted-via-Opus, either way the pipeline should already be primed.

Both pages have real Overview/Specialties copy as of Jul 19; still missing a logo and banner for Oraya AI and a real city in the Location field on both. Small, but it's the first thing a warm connect request sees.

tasks.detail: 8–11 AM PT is 8:30–11:30 PM IST tonight, not this morning. If Frankie's status ping says Monday's call didn't connect, pick up the rotation tonight rather than letting it go a second silent day.
Build around Frankie's finished brochure artifact — a single page an investor can be pointed at, brochure as the download. Pairs with his network scan.
